summary: Completed testing of subscription tier gating system. All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly. Plans renamed from 'enterprise' to 'master', badges (Starter/Pro/Elite) display correctly, lock icons and upgrade modal functioning properly.

minor.issue: PesaPal rejects amounts >9999 TZS with 'amount_exceeds_limit' error. This is a PesaPal account configuration issue, not a code bug.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/subscription/plans returns 3 plans: basic, premium, master (NOT enterprise)
Backend: Plans have correct TZS prices (9999, 19999, 29999)
Backend: GET /api/user/feature-access returns plan, features array, lesson_usage object
Backend: Premium tier user gets 10 features (templates, dictation, upload-materials, scheme-of-work included)
Backend: Premium tier has unlimited lessons (limit=null)
Frontend MyHub: Sidebar shows all 11 menu items with correct data-testids
Frontend MyHub: Lock icon displays on 'Refer & Earn' for premium user (feature not in plan)
Frontend MyHub: Clicking locked item shows upgrade modal with 'Upgrade Required' text
Frontend MyHub: Upgrade modal has 'View Plans' button
Frontend MyHub: Lesson counter widget displays (data-testid='lesson-counter') showing 'Unlimited lessons'
Frontend MyHub: Plan badge displays 'Pro' next to 'MyHub' title (data-testid='plan-badge')
Frontend MyHub: Refer & Earn menu item exists in sidebar
Frontend Dashboard: Plan status bar shows 'Premium Plan' and 'Unlimited lessons · 30d in period'
Frontend PaymentSettings: Shows 4 plan cards (Free, Basic, Premium, Master) with correct badges
Frontend PaymentSettings: Badges are Starter (blue), Pro (purple), Elite (amber)
Frontend PaymentSettings: No 'Enterprise' plan - correctly renamed to 'Master'
Frontend SubscriptionModal: Code review confirms plans are basic, premium, master (NOT enterprise)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with premium plan
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tier gating system fully implemented and tested. Test user (test_session_tts_001) has premium plan. All plan names correctly use 'master' instead of 'enterprise'. Badges are Starter/Pro/Elite. Lock icons work on MyHub sidebar. Upgrade modal triggers correctly. PesaPal checkout works for basic plan but fails for premium/master due to external PesaPal account transaction limit (not a code issue).

backend_api.subscription_plans: Returns basic, premium, master with TZS prices
backend_api.feature_access: Returns plan, features array, lesson_usage with used/limit/days_remaining

frontend_ui.myhub_sidebar: All 11 menu items with lock icons on restricted features
frontend_ui.lesson_counter: Displays in sidebar with usage stats
frontend_ui.payment_settings: 4 plan cards with correct badges and prices
frontend_ui.dashboard_status_bar: Shows plan name and lesson usage
